titleStmt.title: SII 22.72: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 72. (A.R. No. 72 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (III)—28th YEAR (A.D. 1239-40)

summary.p: This records to the gift of a village called Maṉanduyyanallūr as dēvadāna for offerings, worship and repairs in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Śaṇbai alias Vīrarājēndrapuram in Vāṇagappāḍi by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kumāra Padumadēvarasaṉ, who exempted the gift-village even from the antarāyam (rent ?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8vatu peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭic caṇpai
yāṉa virarācentarapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttāṉtoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku svastiśrīmaṉu makāmaṇṭalecuvara muṉivarāttita kumārap patumate
varacaṉen Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku pūcaikkun tiruppaṇikkum Amutupaṭi cāttup paṭikkum nāṉ viṭṭa Iṉāṭṭu maṉantuyyanallūr tevatāṉamāka viṭṭu Ivvūrkku Ellai kiḻpā
ṟkellai maṇalūreri Etirvāyt tiruccūlatevaṟku meṟkun teṉpāṟ kellai peṇṇaiyāṟṟukku vaṭakkum vaṭapāṟkellai cittavaṭat tellaikku teṟku
m Iruṅkoḷap putteri Uḷḷiṭṭa Entalpaṟṟu Uḷpaṭṭa naṉcai puṉcai varicai pāti Iṉṉāya (nāya)ṉāṟku viṭṭu Ivvūrkku Āyam Antarāyaṉaic cāyaṅkoḷḷakkaṭavata
llavākat tantu kuṭuttu Iṉṉāyanāṟkuc cantirātittavarai celvatākat tirukkaṟṟaḷiyile kalveṭṭi viṭṭeṉ kumārappatumateva(ṉa)racaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
